---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## 💭 Proposed Solution
Describe how you think this feature should work.

## 🎨 Design Mockups (Optional)
If applicable, add mockups or examples from other sites.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Describe alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## ✨ Additional Context
Add any other context, examples, or screenshots about the feature request.

## 🎬 Netflix Inspiration (If applicable)
If this feature is inspired by Netflix's design, provide reference links.

## 📊 Priority
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important
- [ ] Critical

## 🤝 Willing to Contribute
- [ ] I'm willing to work on this feature
- [ ] I can provide design feedback
- [ ] I can help test this feature
